campaigns_review_states_recommendations_.name: campaigns_review_states_recommendations_check
campaigns_review_states_recommendations_.value: case when "campaigns"."state" in ('niche_review', 'discovery_ready') then case when jsonb_typeof("campaigns"."niche_recommendation_ids") = 'array' then jsonb_array_length("campaigns"."niche_recommendation_ids") > 0 else false end else true end

campaigns_discovery_ready_approved_check.name: campaigns_discovery_ready_approved_check
campaigns_discovery_ready_approved_check.value: case when "campaigns"."state" = 'discovery_ready' then case when jsonb_typeof("campaigns"."approved_niche_ids") = 'array' then jsonb_array_length("campaigns"."approved_niche_ids") > 0 else false end else true end

dossiers_version_chain_check.name: dossiers_version_chain_check
dossiers_version_chain_check.value: ("dossiers"."version" = 1 and "dossiers"."previous_version_id" is null and "dossiers"."previous_version" is null) or ("dossiers"."version" > 1 and "dossiers"."previous_version_id" is not null and "dossiers"."previous_version" is not null and "dossiers"."previous_version" = "dossiers"."version" - 1)

evidence_inferred_assumptions_check.name: evidence_inferred_assumptions_check
evidence_inferred_assumptions_check.value: case when "evidence"."kind" in ('hypothesis', 'estimate') then case when jsonb_typeof("evidence"."assumptions") = 'array' then jsonb_array_length("evidence"."assumptions") > 0 else false end else true end
